title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
description: Test that when user enables the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle, the system registers the reminder and schedules a WhatsApp notification
preconditions: User has active trial with remaining days
User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner via homepage widget
2. Locate the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle in Manage Trial section
4. Verify the UI reflects the enabled state
5. Check backend/notification system for scheduled reminder

expected_result: Toggle changes to enabled state and reminder is registered in system for 24hrs before trial end
